title: OpenAI Announces GPT-5.2
summary: OpenAI introduces GPT-5.2, its most advanced frontier model for everyday professional work, featuring state-of-the-art reasoning, long-context understanding, coding, and vision.
why_included: This is a high-impact release of OpenAI's advanced GPT-5.2 model, highlighting improvements in key areas relevant to professional and complex tasks.

title: OpenAI Introduces GPT-5.2-Codex
summary: OpenAI introduces GPT-5.2-Codex, its most advanced coding model, offering long-horizon reasoning, large-scale code transformations, and enhanced cybersecurity capabilities.
why_included: OpenAI is releasing a specialized model, GPT-5.2-Codex, focusing on advanced coding and cybersecurity capabilities, indicating a strategic expansion into specialized AI domains.

title: Introducing GPT-5.2-Codex
summary: OpenAI has announced GPT-5.2-Codex, their latest coding model, featuring enhanced reasoning, code transformation, and cybersecurity capabilities.
why_included: This is a new model release from OpenAI, specifically focused on coding, which is a key area in LLM development.
